final_prompt: Photorealistic photograph of a rustic wooden table in an indoor setting, captured from an eye-level perspective exactly at the height of the flowers, slightly from the left. The table has a light brown surface with prominent wood grain and knots. On it, two independent bouquets of roses are placed side by side in the center foreground. Each bouquet contains a mix of deep red and light pink roses in various stages of bloom, with green leaves and thorny stems that have clearly visible, sharp thorns. Each bouquet is tied with a dark green satin ribbon forming a bow. To the left, a window with a white frame is partially visible on the wall, letting in soft diffused natural light that casts gentle shadows on the table. The background on the right is a smooth, light-colored matte wall. The lighting creates soft highlights on the petals and ribbons. The scene is serene and cozy, with warm tones and natural colors. Sharp focus, natural colors. Spatial layout: Bouquets center foreground on table; window left wall; wall right background. Lighting: Soft, from left, no harsh highlights. Textures: Table wood grain and knots; rose petals velvety; ribbon satin sheen; leaves glossy; stems thorny with visible thorns; wall matte. Color palette: Warm browns, reds, pinks, greens, soft daylight. Overall atmosphere: Calm and peaceful indoor setting.
prompt_before: An eye-level photograph, slightly from the left, of a rustic wooden table in an indoor setting. The table has a light brown surface with prominent wood grain and knots, under soft diffused natural light. On the table, two independent bouquets of roses are placed side by side, each consisting of a mix of deep red and light pink roses in various stages of bloom, with green leaves and thorny stems visible. Each bouquet is tied with its own dark green satin ribbon, forming bows similar to the original arrangement. To the left, a window with a white frame is partially visible, allowing soft daylight to enter, casting gentle shadows of the bouquets onto the table. The background on the right features a smooth, light-colored matte wall, providing a neutral backdrop. The light creates soft highlights on the rose petals and ribbon surfaces, enhancing the textures. The scene maintains a serene and cozy atmosphere with warm tones from the wood and natural colors from the flowers. Photorealistic, sharp focus, natural colors. Perspective: Camera viewpoint: Eye-level photograph, slightly from the left, facing the bouquet on the table; Spatial positions: Bouquet in CENTER FOREGROUND on the wooden table; window on LEFT WALL, partially visible; plain light-colored wall on RIGHT, background; Lighting quality and direction: Soft, diffused natural light from the left window, casting soft shadows on the table; no harsh highlights; Surface materials and textures: Rustic wooden table with visible grain and knots, matte finish; velvety rose petals; satin-like dark green ribbon with slight sheen; glossy green leaves with veins; smooth matte wall; white window frame. Style reference: Surface materials and textures: Rustic wooden table with visible grain and knots, matte finish; velvety rose petals; satin-like dark green ribbon with slight sheen; glossy green leaves with veins; smooth matte wall; white window frame; Spatial positions: Bouquet in CENTER FOREGROUND on the wooden table; window on LEFT WALL, partially visible; plain light-colored wall on RIGHT, background; Dominant color palette: Warm wooden tones (light brown), reds and pinks of roses, dark green from ribbon and leaves, soft white daylight; Overall atmosphere: Serene, cozy, indoor setting with natural daylight, calm and peaceful.

constraints: The camera is at eye-level and positioned slightly to the left.
The table is rustic, wooden, and has a light brown surface with visible wood grain and knots.
Soft diffused natural light comes from the left, casting gentle shadows on the table without harsh highlights.
There are exactly two bouquets of roses on the table, placed side by side.
Each bouquet contains a mix of deep red and light pink roses.
The roses in each bouquet are in various stages of bloom.
Green leaves and thorny stems are visible in each bouquet.
Each bouquet is tied with a dark green satin ribbon forming a bow.
A window with a white frame is partially visible on the left side of the image.
The background on the right is a smooth, light-colored matte wall.
The dominant color palette includes warm wooden tones, reds, pinks, and dark green.
The image is photorealistic with sharp focus and natural colors.
The scene conveys a serene and cozy indoor atmosphere through warm tones and soft lighting.
